name: omnipilot-web-guide
description: All-in-one page action guidance assistant — rules + AI, visual step-by-step help (Chrome & Firefox)

scripts.pack: npm run zip && npm run zip:firefox
scripts.ci: npm test && npm run build && npm run assert:content && npm run build:firefox
scripts.deploy:help: node deploy/deploy.mjs docker --dry-run && node -e "console.log('Modes: binary (default), docker/k8s stubs. See deploy/README.md')"
